Very Low.D: The Direction state is conserving force. Pause the push and name the pressure before choosing any next move.
Very Low.I: The Expression state is quieter right now. Do not perform around the feeling; let the signal settle first.
Very Low.S: The Stability state is seeking safety. Return to one familiar rhythm and let the body find ground.
Very Low.C: The Clarity state is protecting itself through control. Reduce the field to one fact, one breath, one next line.

Low.D: The Direction state may want movement before energy has returned. Choose the smallest decision that reduces pressure.
Low.I: The Expression state may be muted beneath the surface. Say one honest thing without trying to carry the room.
Low.S: The Stability state may be absorbing too much. Name one need before adjusting yourself again.
Low.C: The Clarity state may be tightening around standards. Build the smallest useful structure and stop there.

Neutral.D: The Direction state is readable. Move one pressure point forward without forcing the whole situation.
Neutral.I: The Expression state is available. Give one idea a clear container so it can become useful.
Neutral.S: The Stability state is steady enough to notice. Keep the rhythm, but do not disappear inside it.
Neutral.C: The Clarity state is available. Refine one piece, then let the next move happen before overbuilding.

Elevated.D: The Direction state has momentum. Use it with timing, not force.
Elevated.I: The Expression state has charge. Let the spark land somewhere real instead of scattering across the room.
Elevated.S: The Stability state can carry energy without losing rhythm. Support the movement while keeping yourself included.
Elevated.C: The Clarity state is sharp. Turn precision into a usable next step, not another delay.

Very High.D: The Direction state is highly activated. Act with a boundary so momentum does not become overcontrol.
Very High.I: The Expression state is highly activated. Share the spark, then anchor it in one clear action.
Very High.S: The Stability state is holding strong energy. Keep the pace humane and protect the rhythm.
Very High.C: The Clarity state is highly activated. Launch the smallest complete version before refinement becomes pressure.
